docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,130.00 FILED BY LILIE,JIM AS TO DEFENDANT PACE STUDIOS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACE STUDIOS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LILIE,JIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACE STUDIOS INC. $2,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,180.00, CREDIT TO DEFT FOR $500 WHEN CK #6521 WAS CASHED BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PACE STUDIOS INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PACE STUDIOS INC.
